project_type: Monorepo with Next.js 14 web app + React Native/Expo Router mobile-staff app
build_system: npm workspaces + turbo, Next.js app router, Expo Router for mobile
test_framework: No test runner found in repository - validation via TypeScript compilation
verification_instructions: Run TypeScript type check on apps/web. For mobile-staff, run tsc --noEmit in that directory.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. No database available for Prisma migrations at runtime.
contribution_requirements: Push directly to main branch. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Web: Next.js app router, Zod validation in lib/validations.ts, Prisma ORM, shadcn/ui components, Tailwind CSS. Mobile: Expo Router file-based routing, NativeWind for styling, Zustand stores, notifee for notifications, FCM for push messaging. Cart uses CartProvider with addItems method. Admin product form uses PATCH to /api/admin/products/[id]. Admin sidebar uses NavItem[] with group field.
directory_structure: apps/web - Next.js 14 storefront + admin panel. apps/mobile-staff - React Native Expo staff app with (delivery), (packing), (admin) route groups. packages/ - shared packages.
